codeReview.summary: The Rust settings command work cleanly extends the existing Tauri/backend patterns for scan-directory CRUD, settings get/set, and custom-agent update/remove. I did not find a high-confidence correctness bug in the shipped feature diff or its current repository state.

summary: Pass. The settings command surface is implemented, registered, and covered by focused Rust tests without revealing a contract-breaking backend bug in this feature.
